title: theophrasta rodekiana
intro: Theophrasta rodekiana, also known as Kava, is a plant-based supplement derived from the roots of the Piper methysticum plant, a member of the pepper family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce anxiety and stress due to its active compound kavalactone. The health benefits of Theophrasta rodekiana include relief from insomnia, muscle relaxation, and a reduction in inflammation. The herbal preparations of Theophrasta rodekiana typically involve drying and grinding the root, which can then be steeped in hot water to create a tea or added to capsules for consumption.
